name: ai.proxyllm/proxyllm-mcp
description: OpenAI-compatible LLM gateway: models, savings math, key provisioning, autonomous email-OTP signup

environmentVariables.name: PROXYLLM_ACCOUNT_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Optional sk_/rk_ account token for management tools. Create one autonomously via the proxyllm_signup tool or https://proxyllm.ai/auth.md

environmentVariables.name: PROXYLLM_ROUTING_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional pllm_ routing key for key introspection and key-scoped model lists.
